vocabulary.title: come up with
vocabulary.source: 学習院大学25年法学部プラス方式

vocabulary.title: owe you one
vocabulary.source: 学習院大学25年法学部プラス方式

grammar.title: what
grammar.content: whatはそれ自体に先行詞を含んでいるため、直前に名詞（new wordsなど）がある場合は使えない。その場合は that や which を使う
grammar.source: 学習院大学25年法学部プラス方式

strategy.title: 逆接の後の筆者の主張
strategy.content: 長文の中で「But」や「However」が出た直後は、一般論を覆す筆者の重要な主張が来やすいので、そこを精読してマークする。
strategy.source: 学習院大学25年法学部プラス方式

meta.title: I don't have the slightest idea
meta.content: 意味・ルール: 過去問の会話文で "I don't have the slightest idea."（全くわからない）という表現が出たように、本番でも考え込んでも無駄な問題は執着せずにすぐ次へ行く。
meta.source: 学習院大学25年法学部プラス方式

enriched_vocab.meanings: ① 会社、企業 ② 仲間、同席 ③ 劇団、一座
chunks: ① run a **company** (会社を経営する)
② in the **company** of friends (友達と一緒に)
enriched_vocab.context: ビジネス、経済系の長文で必須。②の「仲間」の意味も頻出なので注意。
enriched_vocab.alert: ②の「仲間」の意味では不可算名詞なので a/an がつかず、複数形にもならない。

enriched_vocab.meanings: ① 薬、医薬品 ② 医学、医療
chunks: ① take **medicine** for a cold (風邪のために薬を飲む)
② study **medicine** at university (大学で医学を学ぶ)
enriched_vocab.context: 医療・科学系の長文で頻出。
enriched_vocab.alert: 「医学」の意味では不可算名詞として扱われる。

enriched_vocab.meanings: ① 植物 ② 工場 ③ ～を植える
chunks: ① water a **plant** (植物に水をやる)
② a car manufacturing **plant** (自動車製造工場)
③ **plant** a tree in the garden (庭に木を植える)
enriched_vocab.context: 環境・科学系の長文では①、経済・産業系の長文では②の意味で使われる重要多義語。
enriched_vocab.alert: 文脈から「植物」か「工場」かを正確に判断する必要がある。

chunks: ① **carbon** dioxide (二酸化炭素)
① reduce **carbon** emissions (炭素排出量を削減する)
enriched_vocab.context: 環境問題、化学、科学技術系の長文で最重要単語の一つ。
enriched_vocab.alert: 通常、不可算名詞として扱われる。`carbon dioxide` (二酸化炭素) の形で頻出。

chunks: ① conduct an experiment in the **lab** (実験室で実験を行う)
enriched_vocab.context: 科学・研究に関する長文で頻出。口語的な表現。
enriched_vocab.alert: laboratory の短縮形。フォーマルな文章では laboratory が使われることもある。

enriched_vocab.meanings: ① 流行、ファッション ② やり方、方法
chunks: ① the latest **fashion** trends (最新のファッションの流行)
② in a strange **fashion** (奇妙なやり方で)
enriched_vocab.context: 社会・文化系のテーマで頻出。②の意味は少しレベルが高い。
enriched_vocab.alert: `in a ... fashion` で「～な方法で」というイディオムとして覚えておくと良い。

chunks: ① **algae** growing on the pond (池に生えている藻)
enriched_vocab.context: 生物学、海洋学、環境問題（富栄養化など）の専門的な長文で登場する。
enriched_vocab.alert: 複数形が -ae で終わるラテン語由来の単語。複数扱いが基本。

chunks: ① drink **herbal** tea (ハーブティーを飲む)
① use a **herbal** remedy (薬草療法を用いる)
enriched_vocab.context: 医療、健康、食品、代替医療などのテーマで使われる。
enriched_vocab.alert: herb の発音はイギリス英語では/hɜːb/、アメリカ英語では/ɜːrb/と h を発音しない点に注意。

chunks: ① **climate** change (気候変動)
enriched_vocab.context: 環境問題、地理、社会情勢に関する長文では必須の単語。
enriched_vocab.alert: `weather`（天気）は短期的な大気の状態を指すのに対し、`climate`（気候）は長期間にわたる平均的な状態を指す。

chunks: ① carbon **dioxide** (二酸化炭素)
① sulfur **dioxide** (二酸化硫黄)
enriched_vocab.context: 科学（特に化学）、環境問題の長文で登場。
enriched_vocab.alert: `carbon dioxide` (二酸化炭素)という形で覚えるのが最も効率的。

enriched_vocab.forms: 過去形/過去分詞: clothed or clad
chunks: ① **clothe** and feed one's family (家族に衣食を与える)
enriched_vocab.context: 歴史や文学、社会問題（貧困など）に関する文章で見られる動詞。
enriched_vocab.alert: 名詞の `cloth` (布) や `clothes` (服) との区別が重要。

enriched_vocab.forms: 複数形: industries, 形容詞: industrial
enriched_vocab.meanings: ① 産業、工業 ② 勤勉
chunks: ① the automobile **industry** (自動車産業)
② show great **industry** (すばらしい勤勉さを示す)
enriched_vocab.context: 経済、社会、歴史の長文で頻出。②の意味は難関大で問われる可能性がある。
enriched_vocab.alert: 形容詞 `industrial` (産業の) と `industrious` (勤勉な) の意味の違いに注意。

enriched_vocab.forms: 動詞: produce, 名詞: production
enriched_vocab.meanings: ① 製品、産物 ② 結果
chunks: ① a new **product** on the market (市場に出た新製品)
② the **product** of hard work (努力の結果)
enriched_vocab.context: 経済、ビジネス、社会問題など幅広い分野で使われる。
enriched_vocab.alert: `produce` (動詞: 生産する、名詞: 農産物), `production` (生産), `productive` (生産的な) など派生語をまとめて覚えること。

enriched_vocab.forms: 動詞: modernize, 名詞: modernity
enriched_vocab.meanings: ① 現代の、近代の ② 最新の
chunks: ① **modern** society (現代社会)
② equip with **modern** technology (最新技術を備え付ける)
enriched_vocab.context: 歴史、社会、科学技術など、あらゆるテーマの長文で使われる基本単語。
enriched_vocab.alert: 「近代」と「現代」の両方の意味を持つため、文脈（特に歴史関連）での使い分けに注意が必要。

idioms.base_form: a rolling stone gathers no moss
all you have to do is
there is no need to do
when in Rome, do as the Romans do

chunks: ① Could I have **a piece of** that chocolate cake?
① My professor gave me **a piece of** valuable advice.

enriched_idioms.base_form: a rolling stone gathers no moss
meanings: ① 転石苔むさず（職業や住居を転々とする人は金がたまらない、または、活動的な人はいつまでも古びない）
chunks: ① My uncle moves to a new country every year, proving the old saying that **a rolling stone gathers no moss**.
① She is always trying new hobbies and staying active, as she believes that **a rolling stone gathers no moss**.
① The Japanese market **accounts for** 30% of our total sales.
① In this class, female students **account for** more than half the total.
② How do you **account for** the fact that you were absent yesterday?
② The severe weather **accounts for** the delay in the shipment.

meanings: ① ～に本格的に取り組む、～に専念する
chunks: ① The government must **address itself to** the problem of the aging population.
① After taking a short break, she began to **address herself to** her research.

meanings: ① ～に関するアドバイス、助言
chunks: ① I need some **advice on** which university I should apply to.
① He gave me some useful **advice on** how to prepare for the interview.

meanings: ① Aが～するのを許す、可能にする
chunks: ① My parents won't **allow me to stay** out late on weekdays.
① This new app **allows users to edit** photos easily.

enriched_idioms.base_form: all you have to do is
chunks: ① To turn on the computer, **all you have to do is** press this button.
① **All you have to do is** fill out this form to register for the event.

meanings: ① とりわけ、数ある中で
chunks: ① At the meeting, we discussed the schedule, the budget, and, **among other things**, our marketing strategy.
① He is interested in, **among other things**, classical music and modern art.
① She was **among those who** supported the new policy from the beginning.
① **Among those who** applied for the job, only a few had the necessary qualifications.
① **Apart from** being a great singer, she is also a talented actress.
① **Apart from** its historical significance, the city is famous for its beautiful parks.
② The office was empty **apart from** the security guard.
② I like all kinds of fruit **apart from** bananas.

meanings: ① ～から生じる、～に起因する
chunks: ① Many health problems **arise from** a poor diet and lack of exercise.
① The misunderstanding **arose from** a lack of communication.
① He studied hard for the exam. **As a result**, he got a perfect score.
① The train was delayed due to heavy snow. **As a result**, I was late for work.
① Some individual players are good, but the team is not strong **as a whole**.
① We need to consider the problem not in isolation, but **as a whole**.
① **As far as I am concerned**, this is the best solution to the problem.
① **As far as the new project is concerned**, everything is going according to plan.
① You can use my computer **as long as** you are careful with it.
① It doesn't matter what you do for a living, **as long as** you are happy.
② I will never forget your kindness **as long as** I live.
② You are welcome to stay here **as long as** you want.
① You can get a decent lunch for **as little as** 500 yen around here.
① The new device can be charged in **as little as** 15 minutes.
① He bought a new shirt, and he bought a tie **as well**.
① If you're ordering pizza, I'd like some **as well**.
① She is a talented musician **as well as** a skilled painter.
① This restaurant is known for its excellent food **as well as** its friendly service.
① He is not the kind of person I want my son to **associate with**.
① You can tell a lot about a person by the company they **associate with**.
② Most people **associate** the brand **with** high quality.
② I always **associate** the smell of cherry blossoms **with** the start of spring.
① The elevator can only carry ten people **at a time**.
① He was so hungry that he ate three hamburgers **at a time**.

meanings: ① よくても、せいぜい
chunks: ① His chances of passing the exam are, **at best**, 50 percent.
① The report was confusing and, **at best**, incomplete.
① There is a big party **at the end of** the school year.
① I'll get paid **at the end of** this month.
① I'm sorry, but I won't **be able to** attend the meeting tomorrow.
① After she recovered from her injury, she was **able to** run again.

meanings: ① ～のような体格をしている
chunks: ① That professional wrestler **is built like** a truck.
① He's an office worker, but he **is built like** a professional athlete.

meanings: ① ～に気をつける、注意する
chunks: ① You need to **be careful about** your spending if you want to save money.
① Please **be careful about** making noise late at night.
① The research team **is composed of** experts from various fields.
① The book **is composed of** ten chapters, each focusing on a different topic.
① The location of the hotel is very **convenient for** sightseeing.
① Would 3 p.m. on Friday **be convenient for** you?

meanings: ① ～のような形にデザインされている
chunks: ① The new museum **is designed like** a traditional Japanese castle.
① This bottle opener **is designed like** a key, making it easy to carry.
① This old bottle **is hard to open**.
① It **is hard to believe** that he is over 70 years old.
① The photocopier **is in use** at the moment.
① Is this seat **in use**, or can I take it?
